jobs.title: Software Engineer III - Fullstack
jobs.description: Software Engineer III - Fullstack eBay Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 21 hours ago Over 200 applicants See who eBay has hired for this role Apply Join or sign in to find your next job Join to apply for the Software Engineer III - Fullstack role at eBay Email or phone Password Show Forgot password? Sign in Sign in with Email or New to LinkedIn? Join now By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Save Report this job At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts. Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet. Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all. About The Team And The Role TCGplayer connects hobbyists and hobby businesses to communities. We relentlessly improve the exchange of things and thoughts that fuel passions, providing the most compelling destination and tools for collectible card game enthusiasts and professional sellers! TCGplayer, now a part of eBay, promotes and drives growth of our products and services by connecting a global community of millions of buyers with tens of thousands of retailers in a $25B global collectible hobby market. As a Software Engineer II, you will help design, build, and maintain the systems that power TCGplayer's Customer Experience (CX) platform. Your work will enable our CX agents to efficiently support both Buyers and Sellers across every aspect of TCGplayer's business. You will contribute to modernizing applications into a microservice-based architecture, integrate with internal systems and third-party platforms, and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable and reliable customer support solutions. Build and deliver scalable enterprise applications and platform services using C#/.NET, modern frontend technologies, event-driven systems, and AWS cloud services. What You Will Accomplish Develop backend services and APIs using C#/.NET. Build and support enterprise applications and microservices. Contribute to event-driven solutions using Apache Kafka. Develop user-facing features using React.js/Vue.js. Integrate applications with internal and external systems. Participate in performance optimization, testing, and production support. Implement monitoring, logging, and CI/CD best practices. Collaborate with senior engineers on architecture and technical design. What You Will Bring 4–6 years of experience in C#/.NET 6/7/8 development. Experience with ASP.NET Core and REST API development. Experience with React.js/Vue.js and JavaScript/TypeScript. Experience with Python is good to have. Experience with Apache Kafka, Event-Driven Architecture, and Microservices. Hands-on experience with AWS (EC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, DynamoDB). Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, and Git. Experience with PostgreSQL and/or MySQL. MongoDB experience is a plus. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field. Experience building and supporting enterprise applications in production. Exposure to cloud-native development and distributed systems. Additional Details eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines. jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Senior Software Engineer Deloitte Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 1 hour ago 119 applicants See who Deloitte has hired for this role Apply Save Report this job Direct message the job poster from Deloitte Pratik Kulkarni Pratik Kulkarni Manager Talent Acquisition @DeloitteLLP We're Hiring | Senior Software Engineer I | Deloitte India Are you passionate about building scalable, high-performance applications in a modern cloud-native environment? Join Deloitte's Ad Platforms Team and help shape the future of digital advertising technology. Position: Senior Software Engineer Location: Bangalore (Hybrid) Experience: 6+ Years Organization: Deloitte India What You'll Do - As a Senior Software Engineer, you will: Design, develop, and test solutions in a high-throughput, low-latency microservices environment Build scalable and resilient applications using modern engineering practices Enhance system observability with metrics, monitoring, and alerting solutions Translate business requirements and user stories into actionable development tasks Take ownership of key platform components and domain areas Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge-sharing initiatives Participate in on-call support rotations as required Technical Skills We're Looking For: .NET Core & C# ReactJS (or similar front-end frameworks) SQL Server, MySQL, or PostgreSQL Azure and/or AWS Cloud Platforms Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform Kafka, Kinesis, SNS/SQS or other streaming technologies Strong understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies Excellent problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills Preferred: Experience in the AdTech industry Experience working with microservices architecture and distributed systems Why Deloitte? At Deloitte, you'll work alongside talented leaders and innovators, solving complex business and technology challenges while making an impact that matters. We foster a culture of collaboration, continuous learning, inclusion, and growth where you can truly unleash your potential. Apply through LinkedIn or send your updated resume to [sisingh5@deloitte.com] Feel free to like, comment, and share with your network. #Hiring #Deloitte #SoftwareEngineer #DotNet #ReactJS #Azure #AWS #Microservices #Kafka #Kubernetes #CloudComputing #TechJobs #EngineeringJobs #HybridJobs #HiringNow #AdTech #CareerOpportunity Show more Show less Seniority level Associate Employment type Full-time Job function Information Technology Industries Business Consulting and Services, Software Development, and IT Services and IT Consulting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Deloitte by 2x See who you know
